long_description:
[TEL] fluentbit-atracker pod down alert is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel-fluentbit-atracker-pod-down.html
TIP Situation:fluentbit-atracker pod down
TIP Short Description:[TEL] fluentbit-atracker pods have not been running in rias-ng-jp-osa-osa21-prod for the past 2 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::rias-ng-jp-osa-osa21-prod:daemonset:fluentbit-atracker

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)((max by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name=~"fluentbit-atracker.*"})) - (sum by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_daemonset_name=~"fluentbit-atracker.*"}))) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-jp-osa-osa21-prod' and kube_daemonset_name = 'fluentbit-atracker'

Time:             12/08/2025 01:48 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F11577998%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] fluentbit-atracker pod down alert
Description:  fluentbit-atracker daemonset pods have not been running for the past 2 hours
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)((max by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name=~"fluentbit-atracker.*"})) - (sum by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_daemonset_name=~"fluentbit-atracker.*"}))) > 0
Duration: 2 h
Alert URL:    https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D223023
